JUDGE MASON, MNORMAN, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. LISA BERKOWITZ FOR PLTF. DEFT PRESENT AND IN PRO PER. WITNESSES S/E. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED AND ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVARADO,JOSEPHINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 255 WOODSIDE AVE, APT 708, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $711.62 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $711.62, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
